nodes.label: draftText()
nodes.snippet: draftText = (prompt: Prompt) => prompt.map((part) => ("content" in part ? part.content : "")).join("")

nodes.label: draftImages()
nodes.snippet: draftImages = (prompt: Prompt) => prompt.filter((part): part is ImageAttachmentPart => part.type === "image")

nodes.label: sendFollowupDraft()
setBusy()
setIdle()
wait()
add()
nodes.snippet:
add = () =>
    input.sync.session.optimistic.add({
      directory: input.draft.sessionDirectory,
      sessionID: input.draft.sessionID,
      message,
      parts: optimisticParts,
    })

nodes.label: remove()
createPromptSubmit()
pendingKey()
nodes.snippet: pendingKey = (sessionID: string) => ScopedKey.from(sdk().scope, sessionID)

nodes.label: errorMessage()
abort()
restoreCommentItems()
removeCommentItems()
clearContext()
seed()
handleSubmit()
clearInput()
restoreInput()
removeOptimisticMessage()
waitForWorktree()
cleanup()
